Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**************************************************************************************

 Parameterized natural numbers object in the slice category

 If some category with finite limits has a parameterized natural numbers object, then
 each slice also has a natural numbers object. We also show that the parameterized
 natural is stable under substitution and that the functor arising from the
 pseudofunctoriality of the arrow category preserves parameterized natural numbers
 objects. The main work lies in verifying that the necessary functors preserves
 parameterized natural number objects. Here the idea is to calculate the preservation
 morphism and prove that it is equal to some morphism of which one can directly see
 that it is an isomorphism.

 Content
 1. Basic definitions
 2. The universal mapping property
 3. Parameterized natural numbers object in the slice category
 4. Stability under substitution
 5. Preservation by the pseudofunctoriality of the arrow category

 **************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Preservation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Arithmetic.ParameterizedNNO.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fibrations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fiber.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Codomain.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Codomain.FiberCod.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Codomain.CodLimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Codomain.CodFunctor.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section CodNNO.
  Context {C : category}
          {T : Terminal C}
          {BC : BinProducts C}
          (N : parameterized_NNO T BC)
          (PC : Pullbacks C)
          (x : C).

  (** * 1. Basic definitions *)
  Definition slice_parameterized_NNO_ob
    : C/x
    := pr_cod_fib BC x N.

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
C / x ⟦ codomain_fib_terminal x,
slice_parameterized_NNO_ob ⟧

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
C / x ⟦ codomain_fib_terminal x,
slice_parameterized_NNO_ob ⟧

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
C ⟦ cod_dom (codomain_fib_terminal x),
cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob ⟧
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
?g · cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob =
cod_mor (codomain_fib_terminal x)

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
C ⟦ cod_dom (codomain_fib_terminal x),
cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob ⟧
 exact (BinProductArrow
               _ _
               (identity _)
               (TerminalArrow _ _ · parameterized_NNO_Z N)).
    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
BinProductArrow C (BC x N)
  (identity (cod_dom (codomain_fib_terminal x)))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom (codomain_fib_terminal x))
   · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob =
cod_mor (codomain_fib_terminal x)
 abstract
        (apply BinProductPr1Commutes).
  Defined.

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
C / x ⟦ slice_parameterized_NNO_ob,
slice_parameterized_NNO_ob ⟧

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
C / x ⟦ slice_parameterized_NNO_ob,
slice_parameterized_NNO_ob ⟧

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
C ⟦ cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob,
cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob ⟧
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
?g · cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob =
cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
C ⟦ cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob,
cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob ⟧
 exact (BinProductOfArrows
               _ _ _
               (identity _)
               (parameterized_NNO_S N)).
    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC x N) (identity x)
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob =
cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite BinProductOfArrowsPr1 ;
         apply id_right).
  Defined.

  (** * 2. The universal mapping property *)
  Section UMP.
    Context {b y : C/x}
            (zy : b --> y)
            (sy : y --> y).

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
C / x

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
C / x

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
C
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
C ⟦ ?x, x ⟧

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
C
 exact (BC (cod_dom b) N).
      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
C ⟦ BC (cod_dom b) N, x ⟧
 exact (BinProductPr1 _ _ · cod_mor b).
    Defined.

    Let d : C/x
      := slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom.

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
C / x ⟦ d,
codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
  slice_parameterized_NNO_ob ⟧

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
C / x ⟦ d,
codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
  slice_parameterized_NNO_ob ⟧

T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C

PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
C ⟦ cod_dom d,
cod_dom
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) ⟧
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
?g
· cod_mor
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) = cod_mor d

T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C

PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧

d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
C ⟦ cod_dom d,
cod_dom
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) ⟧

T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C

PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
C ⟦ BC (cod_dom b) N, cod_dom b ⟧

T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
C ⟦ BC (cod_dom b) N, BC x N ⟧
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
?Goal · cod_mor b = ?Goal0 · BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)

        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
C ⟦ BC (cod_dom b) N, cod_dom b ⟧
 exact (BinProductPr1 _ _).
        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
C ⟦ BC (cod_dom b) N, BC x N ⟧
 exact (BinProductOfArrows _ _ _ (cod_mor b) (identity _)).
        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N) · cod_mor b =
BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (cod_mor b) (identity N) · BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)
 abstract
            (rewrite BinProductOfArrowsPr1 ;
             apply idpath).
      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
PullbackArrow
  (PC x (cod_dom b)
     (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (cod_mor b)
     (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)) (cod_dom d)
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
   :
   C ⟦ cod_dom d, cod_dom b ⟧)
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
     (cod_mor b) (identity N)
   :
   C ⟦ cod_dom d, cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob ⟧)
  (slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_map_subproof
   :
   (BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    :
    C ⟦ cod_dom d, cod_dom b ⟧) · cod_mor b =
   (BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
      (cod_mor b) (identity N)
    :
    C ⟦ cod_dom d, cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob
    ⟧) · cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
· cod_mor
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) = cod_mor d
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite !assoc ;
           rewrite PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 ;
           apply idpath).
    Defined.

    Arguments slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_map /.

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
C
⟦ cod_dom
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob), cod_dom d ⟧

⟦ cod_dom

       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob), cod_dom d ⟧

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
C
⟦ cod_dom
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob), cod_dom b ⟧
 apply PullbackPr1.
      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
C
⟦ cod_dom
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob), N ⟧
 exact (PullbackPr2 _ · BinProductPr2 _ _).
    Defined.

    Arguments slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_inv /.

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
is_inverse_in_precat
  (dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_map)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_inv

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
is_inverse_in_precat
  (dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_map)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_inv

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
is_inverse_in_precat
  (dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_map)
  (BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
     (PullbackPr1
        (PC x (cod_dom b)
           (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
           (cod_mor b)
           (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)))
     (PullbackPr2
        (PC x (cod_dom b)
           (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
           (cod_mor b)
           (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob))
      · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N)))

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_map
· BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (PullbackPr1
       (PC x (cod_dom b)
          (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
          (cod_mor b)
          (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)))
    (PullbackPr2
       (PC x (cod_dom b)
          (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
          (cod_mor b)
          (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob))
     · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N)) =
identity (cod_dom d)
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (PullbackPr1
     (PC x (cod_dom b)
        (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
        (cod_mor b)
        (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PC x (cod_dom b)
        (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
        (cod_mor b)
        (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob))
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N))
· dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_map =
identity
  (cod_dom
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob))

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_map
· BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (PullbackPr1
       (PC x (cod_dom b)
          (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
          (cod_mor b)
          (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)))
    (PullbackPr2
       (PC x (cod_dom b)
          (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
          (cod_mor b)
          (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob))
     · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N)) =
identity (cod_dom d)
 
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
PullbackArrow
  (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N))
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
     (cod_mor b) (identity N))
  slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_map_subproof
· BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (PullbackPr1
       (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
          (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))))
    (PullbackPr2
       (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
          (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
     · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N))
· BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N) =
identity (BC (cod_dom b) N)
· BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
PullbackArrow
  (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N))
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
     (cod_mor b) (identity N))
  slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_map_subproof
· BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (PullbackPr1
       (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
          (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))))
    (PullbackPr2
       (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
          (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
     · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N))
· BinProductPr2 C (BC (cod_dom b) N) =
identity (BC (cod_dom b) N)
· BinProductPr2 C (BC (cod_dom b) N)

        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
PullbackArrow
  (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N))
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
     (cod_mor b) (identity N))
  slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_map_subproof
· BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (PullbackPr1
       (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
          (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))))
    (PullbackPr2
       (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
          (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
     · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N))
· BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N) =
identity (BC (cod_dom b) N)
· BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
 
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
PullbackArrow
  (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N))
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
     (cod_mor b) (identity N))
  slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_map_subproof
· (BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
     (PullbackPr1
        (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
           (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))))
     (PullbackPr2
        (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
           (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
      · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N))
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N)) =
identity (BC (cod_dom b) N)
· BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N)

        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob))

    (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
       (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
· BinProductPr2 C (BC x N)

          
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (PullbackPr1
     (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N))
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (cod_mor b) (identity N)
· BinProductPr1 C (BC x N) =
identity
  (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
· PullbackPr2
    (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
       (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
· BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)

  (PullbackPr1
     (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N))
· (BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
     (cod_mor b) (identity N)
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)) =

  (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)

· (PullbackPr2

   · BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))

            apply PullbackSqrCommutes.

            apply idpath.
    Qed.

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_inv · cod_mor d =
cod_mor
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             rewrite !assoc ;
             rewrite BinProductPr1Commutes ;
             apply idpath).
      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
is_inverse_in_precat
  slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_map
  (make_cod_fib_mor
     slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_inv
     slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_subproof)
 abstract
          (split ;
           use eq_mor_cod_fib ;
           rewrite comp_in_cod_fib ;
           apply is_z_iso_slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso_are_invs).
    Defined.

    Arguments slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso /.

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
parameterized_NNO_mor N (cod_dom b) (cod_dom y)
  (dom_mor zy) (dom_mor sy) · cod_mor y =
BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N) · cod_mor b

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
C ⟦ cod_dom b, x ⟧
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
C ⟦ x, x ⟧
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· (parameterized_NNO_mor N (cod_dom b) (cod_dom y)
     (dom_mor zy) (dom_mor sy) · cod_mor y) = ?zy
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· (parameterized_NNO_mor N (cod_dom b) (cod_dom y)
     (dom_mor zy) (dom_mor sy) · cod_mor y) =
parameterized_NNO_mor N (cod_dom b) (cod_dom y)
  (dom_mor zy) (dom_mor sy) · cod_mor y · ?sy
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· (BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N) · cod_mor b) =
?zy
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· (BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N) · cod_mor b) =
BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N) · cod_mor b · ?sy

T: Terminal C

PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
C ⟦ cod_dom b, x ⟧
 exact (cod_mor b).

x: C
b, y: C / x

 apply identity.

  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· (parameterized_NNO_mor N (cod_dom b) (cod_dom y)

x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧

  (identity (cod_dom b))

· parameterized_NNO_mor N (cod_dom b) (cod_dom y)
    (dom_mor zy) (dom_mor sy) · cod_mor y = cod_mor b

dom_mor zy · cod_mor y = cod_mor b

        apply (mor_eq zy).
      
C: category
T: Terminal C

x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧

  (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· (parameterized_NNO_mor N (cod_dom b) (cod_dom y)
     (dom_mor zy) (dom_mor sy) · cod_mor y) =
parameterized_NNO_mor N (cod_dom b) (cod_dom y)
  (dom_mor zy) (dom_mor sy) · cod_mor y · identity x

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧

 exact slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor.
      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor · cod_mor y =
cod_mor d
 exact slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_eq.
    Defined.

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z)
· slice_parameterized_NNO_mor = zy

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z)
· slice_parameterized_NNO_mor = zy

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z)
· (inv_from_z_iso slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
   · make_cod_fib_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_eq) = zy

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
dom_mor
  (BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
      · make_cod_fib_mor
          slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor
          slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_eq)) =
dom_mor zy

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
dom_mor
  (BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z))
· (dom_mor
     (inv_from_z_iso
        slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
   · dom_mor
       (make_cod_fib_mor
          slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor
          slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_eq)) =
dom_mor zy

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
dom_mor
  (BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z))
· dom_mor
    (inv_from_z_iso
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
· dom_mor
    (make_cod_fib_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_eq) = dom_mor zy

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
dom_mor
  (BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z))
· dom_mor
    (inv_from_z_iso
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
· dom_mor
    (make_cod_fib_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_eq) =
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· parameterized_NNO_mor N (cod_dom b) (cod_dom y)
    (dom_mor zy) (dom_mor sy)

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
dom_mor
  (BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z))
· dom_mor
    (inv_from_z_iso
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso) =
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
dom_mor
  (BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z))
· dom_mor
    (inv_from_z_iso
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
· BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N) =
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N)

BC: BinProducts C

zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧

d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
dom_mor
  (BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z))
· dom_mor
    (inv_from_z_iso
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
· BinProductPr2 C (BC (cod_dom b) N) =
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· BinProductPr2 C (BC (cod_dom b) N)

PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
dom_mor
  (BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z))
· dom_mor
    (inv_from_z_iso
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
· BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N) =
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
 
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
dom_mor
  (BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z))
· dom_mor
    (inv_from_z_iso
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
· BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N) =
identity (cod_dom b)

        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
dom_mor
  (BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z))
· (dom_mor
     (inv_from_z_iso
        slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N)) =
identity (cod_dom b)

        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
dom_mor
  (BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z))
· (dom_mor
     (inv_from_z_iso
        slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N)) = ?b

d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
?b = identity (cod_dom b)

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧

      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z))
· PullbackPr1
    (PC x (cod_dom b)
       (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (cod_mor b)
       (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)) =
identity (cod_dom b)

C: category
T: Terminal C

        apply idpath.
      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
dom_mor
  (BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z))
· dom_mor
    (inv_from_z_iso
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
· BinProductPr2 C (BC (cod_dom b) N) =
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· BinProductPr2 C (BC (cod_dom b) N)

BC: BinProducts C

cod_mor b · identity x
· BinProductArrow C (BC x N) (identity x)
    (TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· BinProductPr2 C (BC x N) =
TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
cod_mor b · TerminalArrow T x =
TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b)

        apply TerminalArrowEq.
    Qed.

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S
· slice_parameterized_NNO_mor =
slice_parameterized_NNO_mor · sy

  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S
· slice_parameterized_NNO_mor =
slice_parameterized_NNO_mor · sy

b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧

d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x

  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S
· (inv_from_z_iso slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
   · make_cod_fib_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_eq) =
inv_from_z_iso slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· make_cod_fib_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor
    slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_eq · sy

  (BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b

     slice_parameterized_NNO_S
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
      · make_cod_fib_mor
          slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor
          slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_eq)) =

   · make_cod_fib_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_eq · sy)

  (BinProductOfArrows (C / x)

  (inv_from_z_iso slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
· dom_mor
    (make_cod_fib_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor

  (BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b

     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b

x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
dom_mor
  (inv_from_z_iso slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
· dom_mor
    (make_cod_fib_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_eq) · dom_mor sy =
?b
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
?b =
dom_mor
  (BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     slice_parameterized_NNO_S)
· (dom_mor
     (inv_from_z_iso
        slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
   · dom_mor
       (make_cod_fib_mor
          slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor
          slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_eq))

BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
dom_mor
  (inv_from_z_iso slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
· dom_mor
    (make_cod_fib_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_eq) · dom_mor sy =
?b

        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (PullbackPr1
     (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N))
· slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor · dom_mor sy = ?b

T: Terminal C

N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C

zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧

d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x

  (PullbackPr1
     (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N))
· (slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor · dom_mor sy) = 
?b

        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor · dom_mor sy = ?t2

        exact (!(parameterized_NNO_mor_S N _ _ (dom_mor zy) (dom_mor sy))).
      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (PullbackPr1
     (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N))
· (BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
     (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
     (parameterized_NNO_S N)
   · parameterized_NNO_mor N (cod_dom b) (cod_dom y)
       (dom_mor zy) (dom_mor sy)) =
dom_mor
  (BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     slice_parameterized_NNO_S)
· (dom_mor
     (inv_from_z_iso
        slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
   · dom_mor
       (make_cod_fib_mor
          slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor
          slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_eq))

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (PullbackPr1
     (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N))
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
    (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· parameterized_NNO_mor N (cod_dom b) (cod_dom y)
    (dom_mor zy) (dom_mor sy) =
dom_mor
  (BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)

        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     slice_parameterized_NNO_S)
· dom_mor
    (inv_from_z_iso
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
· dom_mor
    (make_cod_fib_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_mor
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_eq)

  (PullbackPr2
     (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N))
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
    (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· BinProductPr2 C (BC (cod_dom b) N) =
dom_mor
  (BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     slice_parameterized_NNO_S)
· dom_mor
    (inv_from_z_iso
       slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
· BinProductPr2 C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
 
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (PullbackPr1
     (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
        (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N))
· (BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
     (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
     (parameterized_NNO_S N)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC (cod_dom b) N)) =
dom_mor
  (BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     slice_parameterized_NNO_S)
· (dom_mor
     (inv_from_z_iso
        slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC (cod_dom b) N))

  (BinProductPr2 (C / x)

   · slice_parameterized_NNO_S)

PullbackPr2
  (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC x N) (identity x)
    (parameterized_NNO_S N) · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N) =
PullbackPr2
  (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
· BinProductPr2 C (BC x N) · parameterized_NNO_S N

· (BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC x N) (identity x)

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
PullbackPr2
  (PC x (cod_dom b) (BC x N) (cod_mor b)
     (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
· (BinProductPr2 C (BC x N) · parameterized_NNO_S N) =
PullbackPr2

     (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)))
· (BinProductPr2 C (BC x N) · parameterized_NNO_S N)

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· (dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
   · dom_mor f) = dom_mor zy

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· (dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
   · dom_mor f) = dom_mor zy

     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy

  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)

      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f)

        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z))

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· PullbackPr1
    (PC x (cod_dom b)
       (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (cod_mor b)
       (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)) =
dom_mor
  (BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z))
· PullbackPr1
    (PC x (cod_dom b)
       (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (cod_mor b)
       (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob))

     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· (dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
   · PullbackPr2
       (PC x (cod_dom b)
          (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
          (cod_mor b)
          (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob))) = 
?b
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
?b =
dom_mor
  (BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z))
· PullbackPr2
    (PC x (cod_dom b)
       (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (cod_mor b)
       (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob))

b, y: C / x

⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· (dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
   · PullbackPr2
       (PC x (cod_dom b)
          (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
          (cod_mor b)
          (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob))) = 
?b

          
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· PullbackPr2
    (PC x (cod_dom b)
       (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (cod_mor b)
       (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)) = ?t2

          apply PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2.
        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (cod_mor b) (identity N) =
dom_mor
  (BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z))
· PullbackPr2
    (PC x (cod_dom b)
       (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (cod_mor b)
       (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob))

    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧

  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
dom_mor
  (BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b

  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (cod_mor b) (identity N)

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
dom_mor
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) =
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (cod_mor b) (identity N)

        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
dom_mor (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b)
· dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_Z =
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (cod_mor b) (identity N)

        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
cod_mor b · identity x
· BinProductArrow C (BC x N) (identity x)
    (TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N) =
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (cod_mor b) (identity N)

        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
cod_mor b
· BinProductArrow C (BC x N) (identity x)
    (TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N) =
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (cod_mor b) (identity N)

        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
cod_mor b
· BinProductArrow C (BC x N) (identity x)
    (TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· BinProductPr1 C (BC x N) =
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (cod_mor b) (identity N)
· BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)

     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)

   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
cod_mor b
· BinProductArrow C (BC x N) (identity x)
    (TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N)

    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧

     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)

C: category

PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x

sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧

⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
cod_mor b
· (BinProductArrow C (BC x N) (identity x)
     (TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)) =

  (identity (cod_dom b))

· (BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
     (cod_mor b) (identity N)
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))

          
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x

sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
cod_mor b · identity x =
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· (BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
     (cod_mor b) (identity N)
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))

· (BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)

     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy

· (BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N) · cod_mor b)

C: category

BC: BinProducts C

    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧

  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
cod_mor b = identity (cod_dom b) · cod_mor b

          
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
cod_mor b = cod_mor b

          apply idpath.
        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
cod_mor b
· BinProductArrow C (BC x N) (identity x)
    (TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· BinProductPr2 C (BC x N) =
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (cod_mor b) (identity N)
· BinProductPr2 C (BC x N)
 
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
cod_mor b
· (BinProductArrow C (BC x N) (identity x)
     (TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N)) =
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· (BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
     (cod_mor b) (identity N)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N))

    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧

  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C

x: C
b, y: C / x

sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x

⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fz: BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
cod_mor b · TerminalArrow T x =
TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b)

          apply TerminalArrowEq.
    Qed.

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fs: BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· (dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
   · dom_mor f) =
dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· dom_mor f · dom_mor sy

    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧

  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· (dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
   · dom_mor f) =
dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· dom_mor f · dom_mor sy

      
C: category
T: Terminal C

⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fs: BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· dom_mor f · dom_mor sy =

  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)

  slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy

· dom_mor f · dom_mor sy = ?b

  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b

dom_mor f · dom_mor sy = ?t2

    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧

  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)

        apply idpath.
      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fs: BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· dom_mor
    (BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
       slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f) =
BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· (dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
   · dom_mor f)

⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fs: BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· (dom_mor
     (BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
        (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
           slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
        (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
           slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
        slice_parameterized_NNO_S) · dom_mor f) =
BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· (dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
   · dom_mor f)

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fs: BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· dom_mor
    (BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
       slice_parameterized_NNO_S)
· PullbackPr1
    (PC x (cod_dom b)
       (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (cod_mor b)
       (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)) =
BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· PullbackPr1
    (PC x (cod_dom b)
       (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (cod_mor b)
       (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob))
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fs: BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· dom_mor
    (BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
       slice_parameterized_NNO_S)
· PullbackPr2
    (PC x (cod_dom b)
       (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (cod_mor b)
       (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)) =
BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· PullbackPr2
    (PC x (cod_dom b)
       (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (cod_mor b)
       (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob))

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fs: BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· dom_mor
    (BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
       slice_parameterized_NNO_S)
· PullbackPr1
    (PC x (cod_dom b)
       (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (cod_mor b)
       (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)) =
BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· PullbackPr1
    (PC x (cod_dom b)
       (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (cod_mor b)
       (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob))

  slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
· identity (cod_dom b) =
BinProductPr1 C (BC (cod_dom b) N)

        apply id_right.
      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fs: BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· dom_mor
    (BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
       slice_parameterized_NNO_S)
· PullbackPr2
    (PC x (cod_dom b)
       (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (cod_mor b)
       (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)) =
BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· PullbackPr2
    (PC x (cod_dom b)
       (cod_dom slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (cod_mor b)
       (cod_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_ob))

x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fs: BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (cod_mor b) (identity N) =
BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (cod_mor b) (identity N)
· dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_S

        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fs: BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
    (cod_mor b) (identity N) =
BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (cod_mor b) (identity N)
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC x N) (identity x)
    (parameterized_NNO_S N)

        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fs: BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b) · cod_mor b)
  (parameterized_NNO_S N · identity N) =
BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (cod_mor b · identity x)
  (identity N · parameterized_NNO_S N)

        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
fs: BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (cod_mor b) (parameterized_NNO_S N) =
BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (cod_mor b) (parameterized_NNO_S N)

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
isaprop
  (∑
   f : C / x
       ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
           slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
   BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
   × BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
       slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy)

PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
isaprop
  (∑
   f : C / x
       ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
           slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
   BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
   × BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
       slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy)

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑
   f : C / x
       ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
           slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
   BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
   × BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
       slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy)

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f₁, f₂: ∑
f : C / x
    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
× BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
    slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
f₁ = f₂

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f₁, f₂: ∑
f : C / x
    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
× BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
    slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : C / x
          ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
              slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
   BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · x0 = zy
   × BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
       slice_parameterized_NNO_S · x0 = x0 · sy)

T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f₁, f₂: ∑
f : C / x
    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
× BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
    slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
x0: C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
isaprop
  (BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · x0 = zy
   × BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
       slice_parameterized_NNO_S · x0 = x0 · sy)

        use isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.
      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f₁, f₂: ∑
f : C / x
    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
× BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
    slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
pr1 f₁ = pr1 f₂

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f₁, f₂: ∑
f : C / x
    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
× BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
    slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso · pr1 f₁ =
slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso · pr1 f₂

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f₁, f₂: ∑
f : C / x
    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
× BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
    slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
dom_mor (slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso · pr1 f₁) =
dom_mor (slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso · pr1 f₂)

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f₁, f₂: ∑
f : C / x
    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy

       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
    slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· dom_mor (pr1 f₁) =
dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· dom_mor (pr1 f₂)

x: C
b, y: C / x

    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
