  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f₁, f₂: ∑
f : C / x
    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
× BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
    slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· (dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
   · dom_mor (pr1 f₁)) = ?zy
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f₁, f₂: ∑
f : C / x
    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
× BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
    slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· (dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
   · dom_mor (pr1 f₁)) =
dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· dom_mor (pr1 f₁) · ?sy

BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· (dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
   · dom_mor (pr1 f₂)) = ?zy
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f₁, f₂: ∑
f : C / x
    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
× BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
    slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
BinProductOfArrows C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· (dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
   · dom_mor (pr1 f₂)) =
dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
· dom_mor (pr1 f₂) · ?sy

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f₁, f₂: ∑
f : C / x
    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
× BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
    slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
C ⟦ cod_dom b, cod_dom y ⟧
 exact (dom_mor zy).
      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f₁, f₂: ∑
f : C / x
    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
× BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
    slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
C ⟦ cod_dom y, cod_dom y ⟧
 exact (dom_mor sy).
      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f₁, f₂: ∑
f : C / x
    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
× BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
    slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
BinProductArrow C (BC (cod_dom b) N)
  (identity (cod_dom b))
  (TerminalArrow T (cod_dom b) · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· (dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
   · dom_mor (pr1 f₁)) = dom_mor zy
 
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC

x: C
b, y: C / x

sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧

    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b

  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b

  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · pr1 f₁ = zy

sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧

f₁, f₂: ∑
f : C / x
    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,

  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)

   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy

  (BC (cod_dom b) N) (identity (cod_dom b))
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· (dom_mor slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom_iso
   · dom_mor (pr1 f₂)) =

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
d:= slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_dom: C / x
f₁, f₂: ∑
f : C / x
    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
× BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
    slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S · pr1 f₂ = pr1 f₂ · sy

        exact (pr22 f₂).
    Qed.
  End UMP.

  (** * 3. Parameterized natural numbers object in the slice category *)
  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
parameterized_NNO (codomain_fib_terminal x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x)

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
parameterized_NNO (codomain_fib_terminal x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x)

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
C / x
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
C / x ⟦ codomain_fib_terminal x, ?N ⟧
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
C / x ⟦ ?N, ?N ⟧
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
is_parameterized_NNO (codomain_fib_terminal x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x) ?N ?z ?s

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
C / x
 exact slice_parameterized_NNO_ob.
    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
C / x ⟦ codomain_fib_terminal x,
slice_parameterized_NNO_ob ⟧
 exact slice_parameterized_NNO_Z.
    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
C / x ⟦ slice_parameterized_NNO_ob,
slice_parameterized_NNO_ob ⟧
 exact slice_parameterized_NNO_S.
    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
is_parameterized_NNO (codomain_fib_terminal x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x)
  slice_parameterized_NNO_ob slice_parameterized_NNO_Z
  slice_parameterized_NNO_S
 
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
∃! f : C / x
       ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
           slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
× BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
    slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   f : C / x
       ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
           slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
   BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
   × BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
       slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy)
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
∑
f : C / x
    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
× BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
    slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   f : C / x
       ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
           slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
   BinProductArrow (C / x)
     (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
     (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
      · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
   × BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
       (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
          slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
       slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy)
 apply slice_parameterized_NNO_unique.
      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
∑
f : C / x
    ⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
        slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧,
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · f = zy
× BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
    (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
       slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
    slice_parameterized_NNO_S · f = f · sy
 
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · ?pr1 = zy
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
(λ _ : BinProductArrow (C / x)
         (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
            slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
         (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
          · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z) · ?pr1 = zy,
 BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
   (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
      slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
   (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
      slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
   slice_parameterized_NNO_S · ?pr1 = ?pr1 · sy) ?pr10

        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
C / x
⟦ codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
    slice_parameterized_NNO_ob, y ⟧
 exact (slice_parameterized_NNO_mor zy sy).
        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
BinProductArrow (C / x)
  (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
     slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
   · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z)
· slice_parameterized_NNO_mor zy sy = zy
 apply slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_Z.
        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x: C
b, y: C / x
zy: C / x ⟦ b, y ⟧
sy: C / x ⟦ y, y ⟧
(λ _ : BinProductArrow (C / x)
         (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
            slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
         (TerminalArrow (codomain_fib_terminal x) b
          · slice_parameterized_NNO_Z)
       · slice_parameterized_NNO_mor zy sy = zy,
 BinProductOfArrows (C / x)
   (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
      slice_parameterized_NNO_ob)
   (codomain_fib_binproducts PC x b
      slice_parameterized_NNO_ob) (identity b)
   slice_parameterized_NNO_S
 · slice_parameterized_NNO_mor zy sy =
 slice_parameterized_NNO_mor zy sy · sy)
  (slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_Z zy sy)
 apply slice_parameterized_NNO_mor_S.
  Defined.
End CodNNO.

(** * 4. Stability under substitution *)
Section Stable.
  Context {C : category}
          {T : Terminal C}
          {BC : BinProducts C}
          (N : parameterized_NNO T BC)
          (PC : Pullbacks C)
          {x y : C}
          (f : x --> y).

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
C ⟦ BC x N,
PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f ⟧

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
C ⟦ BC x N,
PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f ⟧

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
C ⟦ BC x N, BC y N ⟧
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
C ⟦ BC x N, x ⟧
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?h · BinProductPr1 C (BC y N) = ?k · f

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
C ⟦ BC x N, BC y N ⟧
 refine (BinProductOfArrows _ _ _ f (identity _)).
    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
C ⟦ BC x N, x ⟧
 apply BinProductPr1.
    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f (identity N)
· BinProductPr1 C (BC y N) =
BinProductPr1 C (BC x N) · f
 abstract (apply BinProductOfArrowsPr1).
  Defined.

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
C ⟦ PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f,
BC x N ⟧

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
C ⟦ PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f,
BC x N ⟧

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
C ⟦ PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f, x ⟧
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
C ⟦ PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f, N ⟧

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
C ⟦ PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f, x ⟧
 apply PullbackPr2.
    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
C ⟦ PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f, N ⟧
 exact (PullbackPr1 _ · BinProductPr2 _ _).
  Defined.

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat
  slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor
  slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_inv

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat
  slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor
  slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_inv

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat
  (PullbackArrow
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
     (BC x N)
     (BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f
        (identity N)) (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))
     slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor_subproof)
  (BinProductArrow C (BC x N)
     (PullbackPr2
        (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f))
     (PullbackPr1
        (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
      · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N)))

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
  (BC x N)
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f
     (identity N)) (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))
  slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor_subproof
· BinProductArrow C (BC x N)
    (PullbackPr2
       (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f))
    (PullbackPr1
       (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
     · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N)) = identity (BC x N)
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC x N)
  (PullbackPr2
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f))
  (PullbackPr1
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N))
· PullbackArrow
    (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
    (BC x N)
    (BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f
       (identity N)) (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))
    slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor_subproof =
identity
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
  (BC x N)
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f
     (identity N)) (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))
  slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor_subproof
· BinProductArrow C (BC x N)
    (PullbackPr2
       (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f))
    (PullbackPr1
       (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
     · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N)) = identity (BC x N)
 
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
  (BC x N)
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f
     (identity N)) (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))
  slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor_subproof
· BinProductArrow C (BC x N)
    (PullbackPr2
       (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f))
    (PullbackPr1
       (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
     · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N))
· BinProductPr1 C (BC x N) =
identity (BC x N) · BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
  (BC x N)
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f
     (identity N)) (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))
  slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor_subproof
· BinProductArrow C (BC x N)
    (PullbackPr2
       (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f))
    (PullbackPr1
       (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
     · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N))
· BinProductPr2 C (BC x N) =
identity (BC x N) · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N)

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
  (BC x N)
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f
     (identity N)) (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))
  slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor_subproof
· BinProductArrow C (BC x N)
    (PullbackPr2
       (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f))
    (PullbackPr1
       (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
     · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N))
· BinProductPr1 C (BC x N) =
identity (BC x N) · BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)
 
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
  (BC x N)
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f
     (identity N)) (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))
  slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor_subproof
· BinProductArrow C (BC x N)
    (PullbackPr2
       (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f))
    (PullbackPr1
       (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
     · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N))
· BinProductPr1 C (BC x N) = BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)

        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
  (BC x N)
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f
     (identity N)) (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))
  slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor_subproof
· (BinProductArrow C (BC x N)
     (PullbackPr2
        (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f))
     (PullbackPr1
        (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
      · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N))
   · BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)) =
BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)

        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
  (BC x N)
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f
     (identity N)) (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))
  slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackPr2
    (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f) =
BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)

        apply PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2.
      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
  (BC x N)
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f
     (identity N)) (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))
  slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor_subproof
· BinProductArrow C (BC x N)
    (PullbackPr2
       (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f))
    (PullbackPr1
       (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
     · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N))
· BinProductPr2 C (BC x N) =
identity (BC x N) · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N)

BC: BinProducts C

T: Terminal C

  (BC x N)

· (PullbackPr1
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N)) =
BinProductPr2 C (BC x N)

        
C: category
T: Terminal C

  (BC x N)

C: category

BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProductPr2 C (BC x N) · identity N =
BinProductPr2 C (BC x N)

        apply id_right.
    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC x N)
  (PullbackPr2
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f))
  (PullbackPr1
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N))
· PullbackArrow
    (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
    (BC x N)
    (BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f
       (identity N)) (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))
    slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor_subproof =
identity
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)

  (PullbackPr2

T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC x N)
  (PullbackPr2
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f))
  (PullbackPr1
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N))
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f
    (identity N) · BinProductPr1 C (BC y N) =
PullbackPr1
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
· BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC x N)
  (PullbackPr2
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f))
  (PullbackPr1
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N))
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f
    (identity N) · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N) =
PullbackPr1
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
· BinProductPr2 C (BC y N)

  (PullbackPr2
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f))
  (PullbackPr1
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N))
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f
    (identity N) · BinProductPr1 C (BC y N) =
PullbackPr1
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
· BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)

T: Terminal C

· PullbackArrow
    (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
    (BC x N)

       (identity N)) (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))
    slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackPr2
    (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f) =
identity
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
· PullbackPr2

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))

T: Terminal C

     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))

T: Terminal C

  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
  (BC x N)
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f
     (identity N)) (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))
  slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor_subproof =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))

· (PullbackPr2
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
   · f) = BinProductPr1 C (BC x N) · f

        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))
· PullbackPr2
    (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f) · f =
BinProductPr1 C (BC x N) · f

T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))
· PullbackPr2
    (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f) =
BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)

        exact (mor_eq
                 (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
                    (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
                    (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x)
                    (cod_pb PC f)
                    (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))).

· BinProductPr2 C (BC y N) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)

     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))
· PullbackPr1

· BinProductPr2 C (BC y N)

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor_Z
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f)): dom_mor
  (parameterized_NNO_Z
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x)
   · preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
       (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
       (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x)
       (cod_pb PC f)
       (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f)) =
dom_mor
  (TerminalArrow
     (preserves_terminal_to_terminal (cod_pb PC f)
        (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f)
        (codomain_fib_terminal y))
     (codomain_fib_terminal x)
   · # (cod_pb PC f)
       (parameterized_NNO_Z
          (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)))
BinProductArrow C (BC x N) (identity x)
  (TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· (dom_mor
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
        (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))
   · (PullbackPr1
        (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
      · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N))) =
TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N

dom_mor

     (preserves_terminal_to_terminal (cod_pb PC f)
        (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f)
        (codomain_fib_terminal y))
     (codomain_fib_terminal x))
· dom_mor
    (# (cod_pb PC f)
       (parameterized_NNO_Z
          (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)))

  (TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N)

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (TerminalArrow
     (preserves_terminal_to_terminal (cod_pb PC f)
        (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f)
        (codomain_fib_terminal y))
     (codomain_fib_terminal x))
· dom_mor
    (cod_fiber_functor_pb PC f
       (parameterized_NNO_Z

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
dom_mor
  (TerminalArrow
     (preserves_terminal_to_terminal (cod_pb PC f)
        (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f)
        (codomain_fib_terminal y)) (cod_fib_id x))
· PullbackArrow
    (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
    (PC y y x (identity y) f)
    (PullbackPr1 (PC y y x (identity y) f)
     · BinProductArrow C (BC y N) (identity y)
         (TerminalArrow T y · parameterized_NNO_Z N))
    (PullbackPr2 (PC y y x (identity y) f))
    (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PC x y f
       (cod_fib_id y) (slice_parameterized_NNO_ob N y)
       (slice_parameterized_NNO_Z N y))
· PullbackPr1
    (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
· BinProductPr2 C (BC y N) =
TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N

          
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
dom_mor
  (TerminalArrow
     (preserves_terminal_to_terminal (cod_pb PC f)
        (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f)
        (codomain_fib_terminal y)) (cod_fib_id x))
· (PullbackArrow
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
     (PC y y x (identity y) f)
     (PullbackPr1 (PC y y x (identity y) f)
      · BinProductArrow C (BC y N) (identity y)
          (TerminalArrow T y · parameterized_NNO_Z N))
     (PullbackPr2 (PC y y x (identity y) f))
     (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PC x y f
        (cod_fib_id y)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO_ob N y)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO_Z N y))
   · (PullbackPr1
        (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
      · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N))) =
TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N

          
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
dom_mor
  (TerminalArrow
     (preserves_terminal_to_terminal (cod_pb PC f)
        (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f)
        (codomain_fib_terminal y)) (cod_fib_id x))
· (PullbackArrow
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
     (PC y y x (identity y) f)
     (PullbackPr1 (PC y y x (identity y) f)
      · BinProductArrow C (BC y N) (identity y)
          (TerminalArrow T y · parameterized_NNO_Z N))
     (PullbackPr2 (PC y y x (identity y) f))
     (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PC x y f
        (cod_fib_id y)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO_ob N y)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO_Z N y))
   · (PullbackPr1
        (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
      · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N))) = ?b
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b = TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N

  (TerminalArrow
     (preserves_terminal_to_terminal (cod_pb PC f)
        (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f)
        (codomain_fib_terminal y)) (cod_fib_id x))
· (PullbackArrow
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
     (PC y y x (identity y) f)
     (PullbackPr1 (PC y y x (identity y) f)
      · BinProductArrow C (BC y N) (identity y)
          (TerminalArrow T y · parameterized_NNO_Z N))
     (PullbackPr2 (PC y y x (identity y) f))
     (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PC x y f
        (cod_fib_id y)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO_ob N y)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO_Z N y))
   · (PullbackPr1
        (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
      · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N))) = ?b

            
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
  (PC y y x (identity y) f)
  (PullbackPr1 (PC y y x (identity y) f)
   · BinProductArrow C (BC y N) (identity y)
       (TerminalArrow T y · parameterized_NNO_Z N))
  (PullbackPr2 (PC y y x (identity y) f))
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PC x y f
     (cod_fib_id y) (slice_parameterized_NNO_ob N y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO_Z N y))
· (PullbackPr1
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N)) = ?t2

· PullbackPr1

· BinProductPr2 C (BC y N) = ?t2

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C

x, y: C

dom_mor
  (TerminalArrow
     (preserves_terminal_to_terminal (cod_pb PC f)
        (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f)
        (codomain_fib_terminal y)) (cod_fib_id x))

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
dom_mor
  (TerminalArrow
     (preserves_terminal_to_terminal (cod_pb PC f)
        (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f)

· PullbackPr1 (PC y y x (identity y) f)
· TerminalArrow T y = TerminalArrow T x

          apply TerminalArrowEq.
        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC x N) (identity x)
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· (dom_mor
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
        (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))
   · (PullbackPr1
        (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
      · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N))) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))
· (PullbackPr1
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N)) · parameterized_NNO_S N
 
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= maponpaths dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor_S
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f)): dom_mor
  (parameterized_NNO_S
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x)
   · preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
       (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
       (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x)
       (cod_pb PC f)
       (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f)) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x)
     (cod_pb PC f)
     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f)
   · # (cod_pb PC f)
       (parameterized_NNO_S
          (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)))
BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC x N) (identity x)
  (parameterized_NNO_S N)
· (dom_mor
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
        (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))
   · (PullbackPr1
        (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
      · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N))) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))
· (PullbackPr1
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N)) · parameterized_NNO_S N

PullbackPr1
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
· (BinProductPr2 C (BC y N) · parameterized_NNO_S N)

          
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
  (PullbackPr1
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
   · BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC y N)
       (identity y) (parameterized_NNO_S N))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f))
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PC x y f
     (slice_parameterized_NNO_ob N y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO_ob N y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO_S N y))
· (PullbackPr1
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N)) =
PullbackPr1
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
· (BinProductPr2 C (BC y N) · parameterized_NNO_S N)

          
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
  (PullbackPr1
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
   · BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC y N)
       (identity y) (parameterized_NNO_S N))
  (PullbackPr2
     (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f))
  (cod_fiber_functor_pb_subproof PC x y f
     (slice_parameterized_NNO_ob N y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO_ob N y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO_S N y))
· PullbackPr1
    (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
· BinProductPr2 C (BC y N) =
PullbackPr1
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
· BinProductPr2 C (BC y N) · parameterized_NNO_S N

          
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackPr1
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
· BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC y N) (identity y)
    (parameterized_NNO_S N) · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N) =
PullbackPr1
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
· BinProductPr2 C (BC y N) · parameterized_NNO_S N

          
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackPr1
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
· (BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC y N) (identity y)
     (parameterized_NNO_S N)
   · BinProductPr2 C (BC y N)) =
PullbackPr1
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
· (BinProductPr2 C (BC y N) · parameterized_NNO_S N)

          
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackPr1
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
· (BinProductPr2 C (BC y N) · parameterized_NNO_S N) =
PullbackPr1
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
· (BinProductPr2 C (BC y N) · parameterized_NNO_S N)

          apply idpath.
        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BC x N) (identity x)
  (TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N)
· BinProductPr2 C (BC x N) =
TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N
 
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N =
TerminalArrow T x · parameterized_NNO_Z N

          apply idpath.
        
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (BC x N) (BC x N) (identity x)
  (parameterized_NNO_S N) · BinProductPr2 C (BC x N) =
BinProductPr2 C (BC x N) · parameterized_NNO_S N
 
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProductPr2 C (BC x N) · parameterized_NNO_S N =
BinProductPr2 C (BC x N) · parameterized_NNO_S N

          apply idpath.
    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
  (BC x N)
  (BinProductOfArrows C (BC y N) (BC x N) f
     (identity N)) (BinProductPr1 C (BC x N))
  slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor_subproof
· PullbackPr2
    (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))
· PullbackPr2
    (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)
 
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProductPr1 C (BC x N) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))
· PullbackPr2
    (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f)

      
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))
· PullbackPr2
    (PC y (BC y N) x (BinProductPr1 C (BC y N)) f) =
BinProductPr1 C (BC x N)

      exact (mor_eq
               (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
                  (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
                  (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x)
                  (cod_pb PC f)
                  (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))).
  Qed.

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
preserves_parameterized_NNO
  (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
  (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
  (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f)

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
preserves_parameterized_NNO
  (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
  (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
  (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f)

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_z_isomorphism
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Isos.is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
        (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f)))

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
C ⟦ pr1 (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x),
pr1 (cod_pb PC f (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)) ⟧
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?f =
pr1
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_z_isomorphism ?f

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
C ⟦ pr1 (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x),
pr1 (cod_pb PC f (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)) ⟧
 exact slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor.
    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor =
pr1
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC y)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N PC x) (cod_pb PC f)
     (codomain_fib_preserves_terminal PC f))
 exact slice_parameterized_NNO_eq.
    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
N: parameterized_NNO T BC
PC: Pullbacks C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_z_isomorphism slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_mor
 exact slice_parameterized_NNO_stable_is_z_iso.
  Defined.
End Stable.

(** * 5. Preservation by the pseudofunctoriality of the arrow category *)
Section Preservation.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {T₁ : Terminal C₁}
          {BC₁ : BinProducts C₁}
          (N₁ : parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁)
          (PC₁ : Pullbacks C₁)
          {T₂ : Terminal C₂}
          {BC₂ : BinProducts C₂}
          (N₂ : parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂)
          (PC₂ : Pullbacks C₂)
          {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
          (HF : preserves_terminal F)
          (HF' : preserves_binproduct F)
          (HFN : preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF)
          (x : C₁).

  Definition codomain_functor_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
    : BC₂ (F x) N₂ --> F (BC₁ x N₁)
    := BinProductOfArrows
         _ _ _
         (identity _)
         (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ _ HF)
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F HF' (BC₁ x N₁) (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁))).

  
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁))
     (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (identity (F x))
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF))

  
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁))
     (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (identity (F x))
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF))

    
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
C₂ ⟦ BC₂ (F x) (F N₁), BC₂ (F x) N₂ ⟧
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
is_inverse_in_precat
  (BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁))
     (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (identity (F x))
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF)) 
  ?g

    
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
C₂ ⟦ BC₂ (F x) (F N₁), BC₂ (F x) N₂ ⟧
 exact (BinProductOfArrows _ _ _ (identity _) (is_z_isomorphism_mor HFN)).
    
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
is_inverse_in_precat
  (BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁))
     (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (identity (F x))
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
     (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁)) (identity (F x))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor HFN))
 abstract
        (split ;
         rewrite BinProductOfArrows_comp ;
         rewrite id_left ;
         refine (_ @ BinProductOfArrows_id _ _ _ _) ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         apply HFN).
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
codomain_functor_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))

  
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
codomain_functor_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))

    
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
codomain_functor_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁))
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
codomain_functor_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁))

    
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
codomain_functor_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁))
 
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
codomain_functor_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
?b =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁))

      
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
codomain_functor_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁))
  (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (identity (F x))
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F HF' (BC₁ x N₁)
       (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁)))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁))
  (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (identity (F x))
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F HF' (BC₁ x N₁)
        (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁)))
   · BinProductPr1 C₂
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
          (BC₁ x N₁))) = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F HF' (BC₁ x N₁)
     (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁)))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) = ?t2

        apply BinProductPr1Commutes.
      
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁))
  (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (identity (F x))
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF)
· BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁)) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁))

      
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂) · identity (F x) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁))

      
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁))

      
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) = BinProductPr1 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)

      exact (mor_eq
               (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
                  (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
                  (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
                  (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
                  (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F x))).
    
C₁, C₂: category

BC₂: BinProducts C₂

PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
codomain_functor_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁))

· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) = ?b

?b =

  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁))

  (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (identity (F x))
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF)
· BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁)) =

  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)

HF': preserves_binproduct F

x: C₁
BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
· preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁))

T₁: Terminal C₁

PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) =
BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
· preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF

PC₁: Pullbacks C₁

BC₂: BinProducts C₂

PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
BinProductArrow C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (identity (F x))
  (TerminalArrow T₂ (F x) · parameterized_NNO_Z N₂)
· (dom_mor
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
        (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
        (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor
           F x))
   · BinProductPr2 C₂
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
          (BC₁ x N₁))) = ?zy
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
  (identity (F x)) (parameterized_NNO_S N₂)
· (dom_mor
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
        (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
        (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor
           F x))
   · BinProductPr2 C₂
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
          (BC₁ x N₁))) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) · ?sy
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
BinProductArrow C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (identity (F x))
  (TerminalArrow T₂ (F x) · parameterized_NNO_Z N₂)
· (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
   · preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF) = 
?zy
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
  (identity (F x)) (parameterized_NNO_S N₂)
· (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
   · preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF) =
BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
· preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF · ?sy

      
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
C₂ ⟦ F x, F N₁ ⟧
 exact (#F (TerminalArrow _ x · parameterized_NNO_Z N₁)).
      
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
C₂ ⟦ F N₁, F N₁ ⟧
 exact (#F (parameterized_NNO_S N₁)).
      
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
BinProductArrow C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (identity (F x))
  (TerminalArrow T₂ (F x) · parameterized_NNO_Z N₂)
· (dom_mor
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
        (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
        (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor
           F x))
   · BinProductPr2 C₂
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
          (BC₁ x N₁))) =
# F (TerminalArrow T₁ x · parameterized_NNO_Z N₁)
 
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
p:= maponpaths dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor_Z
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor
        F x)): dom_mor
  (parameterized_NNO_Z
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
   · preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
       (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
       (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
       (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
       (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor
          F x)) =
dom_mor
  (TerminalArrow
     (preserves_terminal_to_terminal
        (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
        (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor
           F x) (codomain_fib_terminal x))
     (codomain_fib_terminal (F x))
   · # (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
       (parameterized_NNO_Z
          (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)))
BinProductArrow C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (identity (F x))
  (TerminalArrow T₂ (F x) · parameterized_NNO_Z N₂)
· (dom_mor
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
        (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
        (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor
           F x))
   · BinProductPr2 C₂
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
          (BC₁ x N₁))) =
# F (TerminalArrow T₁ x · parameterized_NNO_Z N₁)

· dom_mor
    (# (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
       (parameterized_NNO_Z
          (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)))

  (TerminalArrow T₂ (F x) · parameterized_NNO_Z N₂)
· (dom_mor
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
        (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)

HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
identity (F x) · # F (identity x · identity x)
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C₁ (BC₁ x N₁) (identity x)
       (TerminalArrow T₁ x · parameterized_NNO_Z N₁))
· # F (pr221 (BC₁ x N₁)) =
# F (TerminalArrow T₁ x · parameterized_NNO_Z N₁)

x: C₁
# F (identity x)
· # F
    (BinProductArrow C₁ (BC₁ x N₁) (identity x)
       (TerminalArrow T₁ x · parameterized_NNO_Z N₁))
· # F (pr221 (BC₁ x N₁)) =
# F (TerminalArrow T₁ x · parameterized_NNO_Z N₁)

T₁: Terminal C₁

BC₂: BinProducts C₂

PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
BinProductArrow C₁ (BC₁ x N₁) (identity x)
  (TerminalArrow T₁ x · parameterized_NNO_Z N₁)
· pr221 (BC₁ x N₁) =
TerminalArrow T₁ x · parameterized_NNO_Z N₁

        apply BinProductPr2Commutes.
      
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
  (identity (F x)) (parameterized_NNO_S N₂)
· (dom_mor
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
        (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
        (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor
           F x))
   · BinProductPr2 C₂
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
          (BC₁ x N₁))) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) · # F (parameterized_NNO_S N₁)
 
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
p:= maponpaths dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor_S
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor
        F x)): dom_mor
  (parameterized_NNO_S
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
   · preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
       (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
       (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
       (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
       (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor
          F x)) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor
        F x)
   · # (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
       (parameterized_NNO_S
          (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)))
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
  (identity (F x)) (parameterized_NNO_S N₂)
· (dom_mor
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
        (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
        (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor
           F x))
   · BinProductPr2 C₂
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
          (BC₁ x N₁))) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) · # F (parameterized_NNO_S N₁)

x: C₁
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· dom_mor
    (# (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
       (parameterized_NNO_S
          (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) · # F (parameterized_NNO_S N₁)

T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁

PC₁: Pullbacks C₁

BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· (dom_mor
     (# (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
        (parameterized_NNO_S
           (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)))
   · BinProductPr2 C₂
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
          (BC₁ x N₁))) =
dom_mor
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
· (BinProductPr2 C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
        (BC₁ x N₁)) · # F (parameterized_NNO_S N₁))

  (# (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (parameterized_NNO_S
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) =
BinProductPr2 C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF' (BC₁ x N₁))
· # F (parameterized_NNO_S N₁)

  (# (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (parameterized_NNO_S
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) = ?b

  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF' (BC₁ x N₁))
· # F (parameterized_NNO_S N₁)

  (# (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (parameterized_NNO_S
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x))) = ?y'

          apply disp_codomain_fiber_functor_mor.
        
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁

PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
# F
  (dom_mor
     (parameterized_NNO_S
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF'
       (BC₁ x N₁)) =
BinProductPr2 C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F HF' (BC₁ x N₁))
· # F (parameterized_NNO_S N₁)

        
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (BC₁ x N₁) (BC₁ x N₁)
     (identity x) (parameterized_NNO_S N₁))
· # F (pr221 (BC₁ x N₁)) =
# F (pr221 (BC₁ x N₁)) · # F (parameterized_NNO_S N₁)

        
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁

BC₂: BinProducts C₂

PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (BC₁ x N₁) (BC₁ x N₁)
     (identity x) (parameterized_NNO_S N₁)
   · pr221 (BC₁ x N₁)) =
# F (pr221 (BC₁ x N₁) · parameterized_NNO_S N₁)

        
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁

BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (BC₁ x N₁) (BC₁ x N₁)
  (identity x) (parameterized_NNO_S N₁)
· pr221 (BC₁ x N₁) =
pr221 (BC₁ x N₁) · parameterized_NNO_S N₁

        apply BinProductOfArrowsPr2.
      
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁

PC₂: Pullbacks C₂

HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
BinProductArrow C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (identity (F x))
  (TerminalArrow T₂ (F x) · parameterized_NNO_Z N₂)
· (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
   · preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF) =
# F (TerminalArrow T₁ x · parameterized_NNO_Z N₁)

x: C₁
BinProductArrow C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (identity (F x))
  (TerminalArrow T₂ (F x) · parameterized_NNO_Z N₂)
· BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
· preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF =
# F (TerminalArrow T₁ x · parameterized_NNO_Z N₁)

   · # F (parameterized_NNO_Z N₁)) =

· TerminalArrow

        apply TerminalArrowEq.
      
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁

HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
  (identity (F x)) (parameterized_NNO_S N₂)
· (BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
   · preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF) =
BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
· preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF
· # F (parameterized_NNO_S N₁)

  (identity (F x)) (parameterized_NNO_S N₂)
· BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
· preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF =
BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
· preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF

· parameterized_NNO_S N₂
· preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF =
BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
· preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF
· # F (parameterized_NNO_S N₁)

PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
