HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
· (parameterized_NNO_S N₂
   · preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF) =
BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
· (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF
   · # F (parameterized_NNO_S N₁))

        
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁

BC₂: BinProducts C₂

PC₂: Pullbacks C₂

HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
· (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF
   · # F (parameterized_NNO_S N₁)) =
BinProductPr2 C₂ (BC₂ (F x) N₂)
· (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF
   · # F (parameterized_NNO_S N₁))

        apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁

PC₁: Pullbacks C₁

PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
preserves_parameterized_NNO
  (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
  (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
  (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
  (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F x)

  
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁

HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
preserves_parameterized_NNO
  (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
  (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
  (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
  (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F x)

    
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁

BC₂: BinProducts C₂

PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))

    
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁

PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
Isos.is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x))
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))

T₁: Terminal C₁

PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
        (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
        (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
        (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor
           F x)))

    
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
C₂ ⟦ pr1 (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x)),
pr1
  (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)) ⟧
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
?f =
pr1
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
is_z_isomorphism ?f

    
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
C₂ ⟦ pr1 (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x)),
pr1
  (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)) ⟧
 exact codomain_functor_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor.
    
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
codomain_functor_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor =
pr1
  (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₁ PC₁ x)
     (slice_parameterized_NNO N₂ PC₂ (F x))
     (fiber_functor (disp_codomain_functor F) x)
     (preserves_terminal_fiber_disp_codomain_functor F
        x))
 exact codomain_functor_preserves_parameterized_NNO_eq.
    
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
is_z_isomorphism
  codomain_functor_preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor
 
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁))
     (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (identity (F x))
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF))
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F HF' (BC₁ x N₁)
        (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductOfArrows C₂ (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁))
     (BC₂ (F x) N₂) (identity (F x))
     (preserves_parameterized_NNO_mor N₁ N₂ F HF))
 exact codomain_functor_preserves_parameterized_NNO_iso.
      
C₁, C₂: category
T₁: Terminal C₁
BC₁: BinProducts C₁
N₁: parameterized_NNO T₁ BC₁
PC₁: Pullbacks C₁
T₂: Terminal C₂
BC₂: BinProducts C₂
N₂: parameterized_NNO T₂ BC₂
PC₂: Pullbacks C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: preserves_terminal F
HF': preserves_binproduct F
HFN: preserves_parameterized_NNO N₁ N₂ F HF
x: C₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F HF' (BC₁ x N₁)
        (BC₂ (F x) (F N₁))))
 apply is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso.
  Defined.
End Preservation.
